author: @benjaminn8
reason: Default --max-pages 10 multiplied by default page size 50 silently caps every sync to 500 rows. Full-store backfills appear successful but return partial data with no warning. Default 0 (unlimited) matches operator intent; users who need a cap pass a positive number explicitly. Generator template bug filed as cli-printing-press#2057, not yet absorbed.
validated_outcome: shopify-pp-cli sync orders against a live store's full order history returns all rows, not the first 500.
